allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Path 'src/JesLuckyPick.Api/wwwroot' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'src/JesLuckyPick.Api/wwwroot' -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'src/jes-lucky-pick-client/dist/*' -Destination 'src/JesLuckyPick.Api/wwwroot/' -Recurse -Force; Write-Host 'wwwroot updated'")

Bash(powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'C:\\inetpub\\JesLuckyPick' -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path '.\\publish\\*' -Destination 'C:\\inetpub\\JesLuckyPick' -Recurse -Force; Write-Host 'Deployment complete to C:\\inetpub\\JesLuckyPick'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem 'C:\\inetpub\\JesLuckyPick' | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Host ''; \(Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\\inetpub\\JesLuckyPick' -Recurse | Measure-Object\).Count + ' files deployed'")
